title: 3 Idiots
synopsis: Two friends search for their long-lost college genius who taught them to chase excellence, not success.
actual_ending: Rancho is revealed to be the real Phunsukh Wangdu, a celebrated scientist running a school in Ladakh; the friends reunite happily.

title: Lagaan: Once Upon a Time in India
synopsis: Villagers in colonial India agree to a high-stakes cricket match against their British rulers to escape an unfair tax.
actual_ending: The villagers win the match, the lagaan is cancelled for three years, and the rains finally arrive.

title: Sholay
synopsis: A retired police officer hires two small-time crooks to capture a ruthless dacoit who massacred his family.
actual_ending: Jai dies sacrificing himself; Veeru defeats Gabbar, who is handed over to the police as Thakur watches.

title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
synopsis: Two NRIs fall in love on a Eurail trip but must convince her traditional father to break off her arranged marriage.
actual_ending: Simran's father lets go of her hand on the train platform; she runs to Raj as the train pulls away.

title: Swades
synopsis: A NASA scientist returns to India to find his childhood nanny and ends up rebuilding a forgotten village.
actual_ending: Mohan resigns from NASA, marries Gita, and settles in India to bring electricity and education to the village.

title: Rang De Basanti
synopsis: A British filmmaker's documentary about Indian freedom fighters awakens five carefree friends to modern injustice.
actual_ending: The friends assassinate the corrupt minister, take over a radio station to confess, and are gunned down by the army.

title: Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.
synopsis: A lovable Mumbai gangster fakes his way into medical school to please his father and discovers the healing power of hugs.
actual_ending: Munna's 'jaadu ki jhappi' philosophy wins over the dean; he reconciles with his father and the patients.

title: Taare Zameen Par
synopsis: A boarding-school teacher recognises that a struggling eight-year-old has dyslexia and helps him discover his gift.
actual_ending: Ishaan wins the school art competition; his stunned parents finally see his brilliance and embrace him.

title: Dangal
synopsis: A former wrestler trains his two daughters to become world-class athletes against a deeply patriarchal society.
actual_ending: Geeta wins gold at the Commonwealth Games; her father, locked in a storeroom, hears the national anthem and weeps.

title: PK
synopsis: An alien stranded on Earth questions India's religious dogma while searching for the remote that will take him home.
actual_ending: PK exposes the fraudulent godman on live TV, recovers his remote, and returns to his planet — bringing a friend.

title: Andaz Apna Apna
synopsis: Two slackers compete to marry a wealthy heiress and end up tangled with twin villains and a kidnapping plot.
actual_ending: The duo defeats Crime Master Gogo and Teja, both win their loves, and the millions are returned to the family.

title: Black Friday
synopsis: A meticulous procedural about the police investigation following the 1993 Bombay serial blasts.
actual_ending: Most conspirators are arrested over years of dogged police work; the film closes on the human cost of the bombings.

title: A Wednesday!
synopsis: A Mumbai commissioner gets a call from a man who claims he has planted bombs across the city.
actual_ending: The caller turns out to be a common man avenging terror victims; he kills four terrorists and walks free unidentified.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur
synopsis: A coal-belt blood feud between two clans plays out across three generations of revenge in Dhanbad.
actual_ending: Sardar Khan is gunned down at a petrol pump as his wife waits in the car; the cycle of vengeance continues into Part 2.

title: Queen
synopsis: A jilted Delhi bride goes on her honeymoon to Paris and Amsterdam alone — and finds herself.
actual_ending: Rani returns to India confident, hands her ring back to her ex-fiancé, and walks out smiling.

title: Barfi!
synopsis: A deaf-mute charmer in Darjeeling loves two women across decades — one who marries someone else, one who is autistic.
actual_ending: Barfi spends his life with Jhilmil; both die holding hands in a hospital, watched over by a tearful Shruti.

title: Andhadhun
synopsis: A pianist faking blindness witnesses a murder and gets pulled into an escalating game of betrayal.
actual_ending: Akash narrates a clean version to Sophie in London; a final flick of his cane suggests he is still pretending.

title: Kahaani
synopsis: A pregnant woman arrives in Kolkata searching for her missing husband during Durga Puja.
actual_ending: Vidya is revealed to be a trained agent who came to assassinate the terrorist responsible for her husband's death.

title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
synopsis: Three friends take a Spanish road trip before one of their weddings, each conquering a fear they chose for the others.
actual_ending: All three confront their fears and return changed; Arjun and Laila reunite and Imraan finds his biological father.

title: Special 26
synopsis: A group of con men pose as CBI officers to raid corrupt politicians and businessmen across 1980s India.
actual_ending: After a final mega-heist at Mumbai Jewellers, the gang escapes with the loot, leaving the real CBI fooled.

title: Article 15
synopsis: A Delhi-bred IPS officer posted to a UP village investigates the rape and murder of two Dalit girls.
actual_ending: Ayan exposes the caste conspiracy, recovers a missing girl alive, and forces the system to file the case correctly.

title: Pink
synopsis: Three working women in Delhi face a courtroom battle after defending themselves against assault.
actual_ending: Retired lawyer Deepak Sehgal proves the men's intent; the women are acquitted, the men convicted.

title: Masaan
synopsis: Two parallel stories of grief, caste and shame unfold along the ghats of Varanasi.
actual_ending: Devi and Deepak meet on a boat to Allahabad; strangers, both quietly carrying their losses to a new beginning.

title: Tumbbad
synopsis: A man inherits a cursed family secret in a rain-drenched Maharashtrian village — a hidden god of greed.
actual_ending: Vinayak is consumed by Hastar's hunger; his son survives but inherits the same curse, taking only one coin.

title: Newton
synopsis: An idealistic election officer is sent to conduct polling in a Maoist-infested Chhattisgarh forest.
actual_ending: Newton holds the polling station open until 3pm despite hostile soldiers; back in his old job, he insists on punctuality.

title: Gully Boy
synopsis: A Dharavi rapper chases his hip-hop dream against his family's expectations and his neighbourhood's grind.
actual_ending: Murad wins a national rap battle and signs his first record deal; Safeena waits for him outside, beaming.

title: Lage Raho Munna Bhai
synopsis: Munna starts seeing the ghost of Mahatma Gandhi, who teaches him 'Gandhigiri' to win a radio host's heart.
actual_ending: Munna, exposed on live radio, embraces non-violent truth; he wins Jhanvi over and inspires a wave of Gandhigiri.

title: Dil Chahta Hai
synopsis: Three best friends in modern Mumbai drift apart over love, ego and life choices after college.
actual_ending: After Sid's heartbreak and Akash's epiphany in Sydney, the trio reconciles in a hospital and stays best friends.

title: Kal Ho Naa Ho
synopsis: A cheerful stranger in New York transforms a depressed family — while hiding that he is dying.
actual_ending: Aman dies of his heart condition; Naina marries Rohit, who he had selflessly pushed her toward.

title: Veer-Zaara
synopsis: An Indian Air Force officer spends 22 years in a Pakistani prison for a love he refuses to deny.
actual_ending: A young Pakistani lawyer wins his freedom; Veer reunites with Zaara and crosses the border home.

title: My Name Is Khan
synopsis: A man with Asperger's travels across post-9/11 America to tell the President he is not a terrorist.
actual_ending: Rizwan finally meets the new President, reconciles with Mandira, and helps the small town of Wilhelmina rebuild.

title: Chak De! India
synopsis: A disgraced ex-hockey captain coaches the bickering Indian women's hockey team to redemption.
actual_ending: The team beats Australia in the World Cup final; Kabir Khan walks home a hero, his honour restored.

title: Jab We Met
synopsis: A heartbroken industrialist meets a chatty Punjabi girl on a train and his life unravels — wonderfully.
actual_ending: Aditya stops Geet's wedding to her wrong-fit boyfriend; she chooses him and they begin again.

title: Wake Up Sid
synopsis: A spoiled Mumbai college dropout grows up under the gentle nudge of an aspiring older writer.
actual_ending: Sid kisses Aisha on her terrace as the monsoon arrives; he has finally found his life and a career in photography.

title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
synopsis: The story of Milkha Singh, the Flying Sikh, who outran his Partition trauma to almost-glory at the 1960 Olympics.
actual_ending: Milkha returns to Pakistan years later, beats his Olympic rival, and finally lays his ghosts to rest.

title: Manjhi: The Mountain Man
synopsis: A poor labourer in Bihar carves a road through a mountain over 22 years after the hill kills his wife.
actual_ending: Dashrath Manjhi finishes the road single-handedly, shrinking a 55-km journey to 15 km; he becomes a folk hero.

title: M.S. Dhoni: The Untold Story
synopsis: A small-town ticket-collector rises through Indian cricket to lift the 2011 World Cup as captain.
actual_ending: Dhoni hits the iconic six off Kulasekara at Wankhede; India wins the World Cup after 28 years.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
synopsis: A devout Hanuman bhakt vows to return a mute Pakistani girl, separated from her mother, across the border.
actual_ending: Pawan crosses to Pakistan, returns Munni to her family; the girl shouts 'Mama!' for the first time as he walks away.

title: Rocket Singh: Salesman of the Year
synopsis: A modest sales trainee runs an honest 'company within a company' from inside his cynical employer's office.
actual_ending: His scheme is exposed; he leaves on his own terms, founding Rocket Sales Corporation as a fully legitimate firm.

title: Iqbal
synopsis: A deaf-mute village boy with a perfect bowling action chases his dream of playing for India.
actual_ending: Iqbal makes it into the Indian cricket team; his alcoholic coach watches proudly from the stands.

title: Black
synopsis: A relentless teacher draws a deaf-blind girl out of darkness — and decades later, she returns the favour as he loses his mind.
actual_ending: Michelle, now graduated, helps her old teacher Sahai re-learn the alphabet as Alzheimer's takes him.

title: Hera Pheri
synopsis: Three penniless tenants get a wrong-number ransom call and decide to swap places with the kidnappers.
actual_ending: After endless slapstick, the trio rescues the girl and ends up rich; they buy the garage they used to scam.

title: Phir Hera Pheri
synopsis: Raju, Shyam and Baburao gamble their newfound fortune on a 21-day double-money scheme that turns out to be a con.
actual_ending: After a dizzying sequence of swaps, the trio recovers their crores from the gangsters and stays unbearably hopeful.

title: Saathiya
synopsis: A young couple's love marriage frays under daily compromises until tragedy puts everything in perspective.
actual_ending: Aditya finds Suhani after her accident; they reconcile in the hospital and choose to rebuild their marriage.

title: Stree
synopsis: A small-town tailor and his friends discover their village is haunted by a vengeful spirit who abducts only men.
actual_ending: Vicky cuts the spirit's hair to subdue her, and Chanderi finally builds a temple to honour rather than fear her.

title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
synopsis: A small-town printer is forced to play the fictional author of a novel by a girl he secretly loves.
actual_ending: Bitti realises Chirag is the real author who loves her; she chooses him over the impostor on her wedding day.

title: Dum Laga Ke Haisha
synopsis: A reluctant Haridwar groom married to an overweight teacher must literally carry her in a town wife-carrying race.
actual_ending: Prem learns to love Sandhya for who she is; they win the race and the marriage finds its feet.

title: Vicky Donor
synopsis: A jobless Delhi boy is recruited as a sperm donor by an obsessive infertility doctor, then has to confess to his fiancée.
actual_ending: After a fight, Ashima accepts Vicky's secret donations; together they donate openly and start a family.

title: Piku
synopsis: A Delhi architect is held hostage by her hypochondriac father's bowel obsession on a road trip to Kolkata.
actual_ending: Bhaskor dies peacefully after a final perfect motion; Piku learns to live for herself with the cab-owner Rana.

title: Talvar
synopsis: A fictionalised retelling of the Aarushi-Hemraj double-murder investigation, seen from three competing CBI angles.
actual_ending: The third CBI team's botched closure report convicts the parents; the film leaves their guilt deeply uncertain.

title: Haider
synopsis: Vishal Bhardwaj's Hamlet — set in 1995 Kashmir, where a student returns to find his father disappeared.
actual_ending: Haider corners his uncle but, remembering his mother's last words, lets him go; he walks away from revenge.

title: Maqbool
synopsis: A Mumbai don's right-hand man is goaded by his lover (the don's mistress) into murdering his boss.
actual_ending: Maqbool, racked by guilt, watches Nimmi die and is gunned down moments later, the empire already gone to others.

title: Omkara
synopsis: Vishal Bhardwaj's Othello, set in the political badlands of UP.
actual_ending: Omkara strangles Dolly on their wedding bed after Langda's lies; on learning the truth, he shoots himself.

title: Gangs of Wasseypur — Part 2
synopsis: The next generation of the Khan family takes the blood feud to its bloody, drug-soaked finale.
actual_ending: Faizal kills Ramadhir Singh in a Wasseypur lane after a chase through narrow gullies; the feud is finally over.

title: Udaan
synopsis: A 17-year-old expelled from boarding school is dragged back to a brutal father, a job in a steel factory, and a half-brother he never knew.
actual_ending: Rohan beats his father in a footrace, leaves Jamshedpur with his little brother, and heads off to study writing.

title: Khosla Ka Ghosla
synopsis: A retired middle-class Delhi family stages an elaborate sting to reclaim a plot of land grabbed by a bully.
actual_ending: The Khoslas con the conman into 'buying' his own plot back at full price; they get their land and their pride.

title: Oye Lucky! Lucky Oye!
synopsis: A charming Delhi serial burglar steals from the rich and the merely better-off, never quite escaping his class.
actual_ending: Lucky is finally arrested but escapes again from a TV studio mid-interview, vanishing into Delhi's crowds.

title: The Lunchbox
synopsis: A misdelivered Mumbai dabba sparks a tender letter-romance between a lonely accountant and a neglected wife.
actual_ending: Saajan resigns from his Bhutan retirement, returns to Mumbai, and rides off looking for Ila — left ambiguous.

title: Highway
synopsis: A wealthy Delhi bride is kidnapped a week before her wedding and finds unexpected freedom on the road with her abductor.
actual_ending: Mahabir is killed in a police raid in the Himalayas; Veera returns home, confronts her abuser, and lives alone in a hill cottage.

title: Kapoor & Sons
synopsis: Two estranged brothers return to Coonoor when their grandfather has a heart attack — and the family unravels.
actual_ending: After a devastating dinner-table fight and the grandfather's death, the brothers reconcile years later at his memorial.

title: Dear Zindagi
synopsis: A young Mumbai cinematographer in creative limbo seeks therapy from an unconventional Goa-based psychologist.
actual_ending: Kaira makes peace with her parents, finishes her debut film, and meets Jug one last time as a friend.

title: Raazi
synopsis: A Kashmiri student is married into a Pakistani military family in 1971 to spy for Indian intelligence.
actual_ending: Sehmat returns home pregnant after exposing the plot; she raises her son alone, haunted by the lives she ended.

title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
synopsis: A dramatised account of the 2016 Indian surgical strikes against terror launchpads in PoK after the Uri attack.
actual_ending: The strike succeeds with no Indian casualties; Vihaan answers his prime minister's call from across the LoC.

title: Section 375
synopsis: A film director is accused of raping his costume assistant; the case becomes a national debate on consent and law.
actual_ending: The director is convicted on a technicality; both lawyers leave unsure whether justice was served — the verdict deliberately ambivalent.

title: Mulk
synopsis: A Muslim joint family in Varanasi is put on trial after one son is implicated in a terror attack.
actual_ending: Aarti's defence wins; the family is acquitted but Murad Ali's quiet speech about belonging haunts the courtroom.

title: Kesari
synopsis: 21 Sikh soldiers defend Saragarhi fort against 10,000 Afghan tribesmen in 1897.
actual_ending: All 21 soldiers die fighting; their last stand becomes one of the greatest in military history.

title: Mardaani
synopsis: A Mumbai crime-branch officer hunts a child-trafficking kingpin across India.
actual_ending: Shivani lures Karan into a trap; the rescued girls beat him to death as she silently lets it happen.

title: Drishyam
synopsis: A cable-TV operator and his family hide a killing using everything he has learned from the movies.
actual_ending: Vijay outsmarts the police; the body is found buried under a police station the family helped construct.

title: Drishyam 2
synopsis: Seven years later, the past starts to catch up with Vijay Salgaonkar — and a new investigator is on his trail.
actual_ending: Vijay had switched the body years ago; the cops dig up an animal carcass and the case finally collapses.

title: 12th Fail
synopsis: A boy from Chambal who failed his 12th Boards grinds his way through grinding poverty to crack the UPSC.
actual_ending: Manoj clears the Civil Services interview after multiple rejections; he becomes an IPS officer and marries Shraddha.

title: Jawan
synopsis: A masked vigilante and his all-female squad hijack public systems to expose corrupt elites.
actual_ending: Vikram and his son Azad together kill arms-dealer Kalee; Azad continues the crusade as the film teases a sequel.

title: Animal
synopsis: A son's lifelong rage at his absent industrialist father curdles into a dynastic war of revenge.
actual_ending: Ranvijay slaughters his father's enemies, survives an axe to the chest, and limps home — already eyeing a sequel.

title: Thappad
synopsis: A single slap from her husband at a party makes a Delhi housewife rethink her entire marriage.
actual_ending: Amrita walks out of the marriage, refuses an apology she does not believe, and rebuilds her life on her own terms.

title: Don
synopsis: An ordinary lookalike is recruited by Indian police to impersonate the dead Mumbai don Don.
actual_ending: The 'Don' that survives is the real one — he had switched places with Vijay all along; police never realise.

title: Don 2
synopsis: Don breaks out of a Berlin jail to engineer the heist of European currency printing plates.
actual_ending: Don escapes Interpol again, the plates with him; Roma is left holding a fake confession.

title: Krrish
synopsis: The masked superhero Krrish protects Singapore and uncovers his father's fate.
actual_ending: Krrish defeats Dr. Arya, rescues his presumed-dead father Rohit, and reunites the family.

title: Ra.One
synopsis: A game character escapes into the real world; his creator's son must enlist his digital brother G.One to fight back.
actual_ending: G.One destroys Ra.One in Mumbai's Chhatrapati Shivaji station; Sonia and her son carry his memory chip home.

title: Krrish 3
synopsis: Krrish faces Kaal and his army of mutant Maanvars while balancing fatherhood.
actual_ending: Krrish kills Kaal; his son inherits powers from both heroes — a new generation begins.

title: Padmaavat
synopsis: Sultan Alauddin Khilji obsessively lays siege to Chittor for the legendary queen Padmavati.
actual_ending: Ratan Singh dies in single combat; Padmavati and the women perform jauhar before the city falls.

title: Bajirao Mastani
synopsis: The Peshwa Bajirao falls for the half-Muslim warrior princess Mastani; his court refuses to accept her.
actual_ending: Bajirao dies of fever on the banks of the Narmada; Mastani dies the same instant in confinement.

title: Devdas
synopsis: A wealthy heir destroys himself with drink and grief after he is forbidden to marry his childhood love.
actual_ending: Devdas dies at the gate of Paro's mansion; she runs to him as the gates are slammed shut.

title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham
synopsis: A wealthy patriarch disowns his adopted son for marrying beneath him; years later, the family must heal.
actual_ending: Rahul reunites with his father and family in Diwali sunlight; everyone forgives, everyone hugs, everyone cries.

title: Sultan
synopsis: A retired Haryanvi wrestler returns to MMA to win his estranged wife's respect after a family tragedy.
actual_ending: Sultan wins the Pro Takedown final, donates the prize money to a blood bank, and reunites with Aarfa.

title: Dabangg
synopsis: A swaggering UP cop takes on a corrupt politician, romances a potter's daughter, and reconciles with his step-family.
actual_ending: Chulbul Pandey kills Cheddi Singh, marries Rajjo, and dances his way through his stepfather's funeral.

title: Pad Man
synopsis: Lakshmikant Chauhan invents a low-cost sanitary pad machine to spare rural women shame and infection.
actual_ending: Lakshmi addresses the UN, his invention is rolled out across India, and he reunites tenderly with his estranged wife.

title: Raanjhanaa
synopsis: A Banaras boy's lifelong obsession with his Muslim neighbour ends up tangled in a Delhi student political movement.
actual_ending: Kundan is shot in a campus rally and dies cradled by Zoya; she takes over his political legacy.

title: Stree 2
synopsis: Chanderi faces a new headless horror — and the same band of friends must save the women being abducted.
actual_ending: With Stree's blessing, Vicky beheads the Sarkata; the village celebrates, and a sequel teases more lore.

title: Munjya
synopsis: A Pune boy is haunted by a 150-year-old ghost-uncle who wants to marry his cousin.
actual_ending: The Munjya is exorcised in Konkan; the family ritual frees Bittu to live and love freely.

title: Laapataa Ladies
synopsis: Two veiled brides are accidentally swapped on a train in 2001 rural India; both find unexpected freedom.
actual_ending: Phool reunites with her husband Deepak; Jaya escapes her abusive marriage to study agriculture in Dehradun.

title: Shershaah
synopsis: The life and Kargil heroism of Captain Vikram Batra, PVC.
actual_ending: Vikram Batra is killed at Point 4875 saving a junior officer; Dimple receives his posthumous Param Vir Chakra.

title: Jersey
synopsis: A retired Ranji cricketer in his late thirties attempts a comeback to fulfil his son's wish for a real jersey.
actual_ending: Arjun makes a stunning debut for India; the film reveals the comeback was a story written by his now-grown son.

synopsis: India's underdog 1983 cricket World Cup campaign under Kapil Dev.
actual_ending: Kapil's eleven defeats the West Indies at Lord's; India lifts its first World Cup as a nation roars.

title: Kantara
synopsis: A Karnataka coastal village's ritual link to a forest deity collides with a forest officer and a land-grabbing landlord.
actual_ending: Shiva is possessed by Panjurli during the climactic kola; he kills the landlord and saves the land for the villagers.

title: RRR
synopsis: Two Indian revolutionaries — Bheem and Raju — meet in 1920 Delhi as friends, unaware they are on opposite sides.
actual_ending: Bheem and Raju storm the British armoury together, free the kidnapped Malli, and ride home as legends.

title: Karthik Calling Karthik
synopsis: A meek Mumbai office worker starts getting 5 a.m. calls from himself that turn his life around — until they don't.
actual_ending: Karthik realises the caller was his own dissociative voice; he chooses therapy and life with Shonali.

title: Badhaai Ho
synopsis: A 25-year-old Delhi office worker is mortified when his middle-aged parents announce a pregnancy.
actual_ending: Nakul accepts his baby brother; the family confronts gossip together and welcomes the newborn at the hospital.

title: Tanu Weds Manu
synopsis: An NRI doctor's arranged-marriage trip to Kanpur turns into a chase after a wild girl who is in love with someone else.
actual_ending: After a long detour, Tanu and Manu marry — choosing each other after watching their original lives almost happen.

title: Inception
synopsis: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a CEO.
actual_ending: Cobb returns home to his children; the spinning top wobbles before the cut to black, leaving reality ambiguous.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
synopsis: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.
actual_ending: Andy escapes through a tunnel; Red, paroled, finds him on a Mexican beach in Zihuatanejo.

title: The Godfather
synopsis: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.
actual_ending: Michael becomes the new Don; the door closes on Kay's face as men kiss his ring.

title: The Dark Knight
synopsis: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime, helped by Lt. Gordon and DA Harvey Dent, but a criminal mastermind known as the Joker has plans of his own.
actual_ending: Batman takes the blame for Dent's murders and rides into the night, a hunted hero.

title: Pulp Fiction
synopsis: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster's wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.
actual_ending: Jules spares the diner robbers, quoting Ezekiel; he and Vincent walk out into the morning.

title: Forrest Gump
synopsis: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the events of Vietnam and Watergate unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.
actual_ending: Forrest watches young Forrest board the school bus, a feather drifts off into the wind.

title: Interstellar
synopsis: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.
actual_ending: Cooper reunites briefly with elderly Murph and leaves to find Brand on a habitable planet.

title: The Matrix
synopsis: A hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.
actual_ending: Neo flies into the sky after promising to free humanity from the simulation.

title: Gladiator
synopsis: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.
actual_ending: Maximus kills Commodus in the arena and dies, reuniting with his family in the afterlife.

title: The Prestige
synopsis: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything they have.
actual_ending: Borden's twin reveal collides with Angier's cloning machine; both have hidden one terrible secret.

title: Fight Club
synopsis: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into much more.
actual_ending: The Narrator shoots himself to kill Tyler, then watches the buildings explode holding Marla's hand.

title: Titanic
synopsis: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.
actual_ending: Rose drops the Heart of the Ocean into the sea; she dreams of reuniting with Jack on the staircase.

title: The Lion King
synopsis: Lion prince Simba and his father are targeted by his bitter uncle, who wants to ascend the throne himself.
actual_ending: Simba defeats Scar, takes his place as king, and presents his cub on Pride Rock.

title: Joker
synopsis: A mentally troubled stand-up comedian embarks on a downward spiral that leads to the creation of an iconic villain.
actual_ending: Arthur dances on a police car amid Gotham riots, anointed as the Joker by his followers.

title: Oppenheimer
synopsis: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.
actual_ending: Oppenheimer envisions the chain reaction setting the atmosphere on fire — a metaphor for the world he unleashed.

title: Avengers: Endgame
synopsis: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. The Avengers assemble once more to undo Thanos's actions.
actual_ending: Tony snaps the Stones, sacrificing himself; Cap returns to Peggy and lives a full life.

title: Whiplash
synopsis: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor.
actual_ending: Andrew's blistering drum solo silences the room; Fletcher gives him the smallest nod.

title: Parasite
synopsis: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan.
actual_ending: Ki-woo dreams of buying the house to free his father — but it's only a dream from the same basement.

title: Spirited Away
synopsis: During her family's move to the suburbs, Chihiro wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits.
actual_ending: Chihiro identifies her parents and walks back through the tunnel, never looking back.

title: Schindler's List
synopsis: In German-occupied Poland, Oskar Schindler becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce after witnessing their persecution.
actual_ending: Schindler weeps over the gold ring inscribed 'whoever saves one life saves the world entire.'

title: Saving Private Ryan
synopsis: Following the Normandy Landings, a group of U.S. soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper.
actual_ending: Captain Miller dies whispering 'earn this'; old Ryan asks his wife if he's been a good man.

title: The Green Mile
synopsis: The lives of guards on Death Row are affected by one of their charges: a black man accused of child murder, but who possesses a mysterious gift.
actual_ending: John Coffey is executed; old Paul, cursed to outlive everyone, walks his still-living mouse.

title: Shutter Island
synopsis: A U.S. Marshal investigates the disappearance of a murderess from a hospital for the criminally insane.
actual_ending: Teddy chooses lobotomy: 'live as a monster, or die as a good man?' He walks to the lighthouse.

title: Django Unchained
synopsis: With the help of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.
actual_ending: Django blows up Candyland and rides off with Broomhilda, free at last.

title: No Country for Old Men
synopsis: Violence and mayhem ensue after a hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and more than two million dollars in cash near the Rio Grande.
actual_ending: Sheriff Bell narrates a dream of his father riding ahead with a horn of fire — then wakes.

title: La La Land
synopsis: While navigating their careers in Los Angeles, a pianist and an actress fall in love while attempting to reconcile their aspirations.
actual_ending: Mia walks into Sebastian's club, exchanges one knowing smile, and leaves with her husband.

title: The Departed
synopsis: An undercover cop and a mole in the police attempt to identify each other while infiltrating an Irish gang in South Boston.
actual_ending: Dignam shoots Sullivan in his apartment; a rat scurries past the railing.

title: Gone Girl
synopsis: With his wife's disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus, a man sees the spotlight turned on him.
actual_ending: Amy returns covered in Desi's blood, traps Nick with a pregnancy, and they smile for the cameras.

title: Inglourious Basterds
synopsis: In Nazi-occupied France during WWII, a plan to assassinate Nazi leaders by a group of Jewish U.S. soldiers coincides with a theatre owner's vengeful plans.
actual_ending: Hitler dies in a burning cinema; Aldo carves a swastika into Landa's forehead.

title: Goodfellas
synopsis: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife and his mob partners.
actual_ending: Henry, in witness protection, picks up the morning paper in suburban anonymity.

title: Breaking Bad
synopsis: A high school chemistry teacher diagnosed with terminal cancer turns to manufacturing and selling methamphetamine to secure his family's future.
actual_ending: Walter dies on the meth lab floor as 'Baby Blue' plays, finally at peace.

title: Game of Thrones
synopsis: Nine noble families fight for control over the lands of Westeros, while an ancient enemy returns after being dormant for millennia.
actual_ending: Bran the Broken is named king; Jon goes north of the Wall; Arya sails west of Westeros.

title: Stranger Things
synopsis: When a young boy disappears, his mother, a police chief and his friends must confront terrifying supernatural forces in order to get him back.
actual_ending: The Upside Down has bled into Hawkins; Vecna's storm engulfs the town.

title: Squid Game
synopsis: Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a strange invitation to compete in children's games for a tempting prize but with deadly stakes.
actual_ending: Gi-hun dyes his hair red, turns from his flight, and walks back to find the games.

title: Money Heist
synopsis: An unusual group of robbers attempt to carry out the most perfect robbery in Spanish history — stealing 2.4 billion euros from the Royal Mint of Spain.
actual_ending: The crew melts the gold, fakes their deaths, and disappears into the world wealthy.

title: The Office
synopsis: A mockumentary on a group of typical office workers, where the workday consists of ego clashes, inappropriate behavior, and tedium.
actual_ending: The crew gathers in the parking lot one last time; Pam paints the office on canvas.

title: Friends
synopsis: Follows the personal and professional lives of six twenty to thirty-something-year-old friends living in Manhattan.
actual_ending: Everyone leaves their keys on the counter and walks out for one last coffee.

title: Chernobyl
synopsis: A dramatization of the true story of one of the worst man-made catastrophes in history: the catastrophic nuclear accident at Chernobyl.
actual_ending: Legasov hangs himself; his tapes finally tell the truth the state tried to bury.

title: Dark
synopsis: A family saga with a supernatural twist, set in a German town where the disappearance of two young children exposes the relationships among four families.
actual_ending: Jonas and Martha unravel the bootstrap world; Winden vanishes and they finally cease to exist.

title: Peaky Blinders
synopsis: A gangster family epic set in 1900s England, centering on a gang who sew razor blades in the peaks of their caps.
actual_ending: Tommy rides off alone, having broken the bonds of his demons and family — for now.

title: Westworld
synopsis: At a Western-themed amusement park, the highly sophisticated androids begin to malfunction and develop free will.
actual_ending: Dolores ends humanity's simulation; the hosts awaken into a world they finally control.

title: House of Cards
synopsis: A Congressman works with his equally conniving wife to exact revenge on the people who betrayed him.
actual_ending: Claire stabs Doug, becomes President in her own right, and breaks the fourth wall.

title: Sacred Games
synopsis: A Bombay police officer receives a phone call from a gangster who tells him to save the city in 25 days, plunging him into Mumbai's underbelly.
actual_ending: Sartaj reaches the bunker; the bomb's countdown reaches zero in shocking silence.

title: Mirzapur
synopsis: A shocking incident at a wedding procession ignites a series of events entangling the lives of two families in the lawless city of Mirzapur.
actual_ending: Guddu massacres the Tripathis at the wedding; Munna dies; the throne sits empty.

title: Scam 1992: The Harshad Mehta Story
synopsis: Set in 1980s and 90s Bombay, it follows the life of Harshad Mehta, the stockbroker who took the entire stock market on a ride.
actual_ending: Harshad collapses in custody; markets crash; the system buries the receipts.

title: The Family Man
synopsis: A working man from the National Investigation Agency tries to protect the nation while keeping his family safe.
actual_ending: Srikant defuses the bioweapon at the last second; Chellam Sir warns him: it's not over.

title: Panchayat
synopsis: A comedy-drama, which captures the journey of an engineering graduate Abhishek, who joins as a Panchayat secretary in a remote village of UP.
actual_ending: Abhishek finally clears CAT but stays one more season — home is where the camera is.

title: Delhi Crime
synopsis: Inspired by the 2012 Delhi gang rape, the show charts the Delhi Police investigation into the case.
actual_ending: Vartika nails the last suspect; the team toasts a small victory in a city that still hurts.

title: Kota Factory
synopsis: A black-and-white look at the life of an IIT aspirant in the coaching capital of India.
actual_ending: Vaibhav writes JEE; Jeetu Bhaiya watches the boys go, lighting another quiet cigarette.

title: Gullak
synopsis: A piggy bank narrates the everyday stories of a middle-class North Indian family.
actual_ending: The Mishra family gathers around the dinner table; the gullak smiles and breaks open to start over.

title: Aspirants
synopsis: A coming-of-age drama based on the life of three best friends preparing to crack the UPSC examinations in Old Rajinder Nagar.
actual_ending: SK fails again; Abhilash takes the IAS oath; their friendship outlives the rank list.

title: Paatal Lok
synopsis: A disillusioned cop is assigned a high-profile case that tumbles him into a darker conspiracy than he could have imagined.
actual_ending: Hathi Ram exposes the conspiracy off-record; the system swallows the truth, again.
